title: Sunken Warrior Statue
description: Adds a Sunken Warrior Statue to the ocean floor
body:
**This simple mod adds a Sunken Warrior Statue to the ocean floor.**


![Statue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99acdee9f87ba665eccb937090d25b4fb5b0f37c.jpeg)

- Spawning: The statue can generate in every ocean biome
- Hidden Treasure: secret loot is hidden somewhere inside the statue

![Statue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f06e5f497307a0d8c4e1256edbafdc66f6a8f146.jpeg)

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
